heading: Service of process
label: 7455 Service of process
text: The mailing by certified mail or registered mail of any pleading, decision, order, notice, or process in respect of proceedings before the Tax Court shall be held sufficient service of such pleading, decision, order, notice, or process.
notes: Amendments1958— inserted “certified mail or” before “registered mail”.Pub. L. 85–866

Effective Date of 1958 AmendmentAmendment by applicable only if mailing occurs after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 85–866section 89(d) of Pub. L. 85–866section 7502 of this titleSept. 2, 1958
